description_long: This is a classic outdoor wall-mounted lantern lamp, featuring a hexagonal lantern body with six glass panels framed by black metallic bars. The lamp has a domed, tiered top with a decorative finial at its peak and a matching finial at the bottom. The glass panels are slightly frosted or textured, diffusing the light within. The lamp is attached to a round, robust wall plate by a curved arm, which is also made of metal and matches the lantern's finish. The overall design is reminiscent of traditional Victorian or Edwardian street lamps, lending an elegant and timeless appearance. The lamp is likely intended for exterior use, such as on building facades, garden walls, or entryways.
description: A traditional black metal wall-mounted lantern with six glass panels and decorative finials, designed for outdoor use. It features a domed top and a sturdy round wall plate with a curved arm.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the domed cap, central finial, and the symmetrical hexagonal arrangement of the glass panels.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the curved mounting arm, round wall plate, and the depth of the lantern body.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the full face of the lantern, the glass panels, and the central placement of the wall plate behind.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, similar to view 1, showing the mounting arm and lantern body from the other side.
